activeGoal: 基于 Requirement ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX，对 Sidepanel 会话界面进行深度 UI/UX 架构重构，以实现 OpenCode Web 级别的丝滑流式体验；重点覆盖组件级读写隔离、Markdown 增量异步渲
designSummary: Issue-driven architecture refinement for ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX sidepanel transcript flow after human-authoritative DOM defect escalation. Strict contract: for one runId, all assistant SSE phases (reasoning, tool_call, tool_result/result, text deltas) must aggregate into exactly one logical Assistant Message Node and one physical <article class="transcript-message-assistant">. Empty user nodes are forbidden. Existing software-unit boundaries are retained: SU-SP-TRANSCRIPT-PROJECTION owns run-scoped assistant aggregation in extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts; SU-SP-CONVERSATION-VIEWPORT owns the single assistant DOM boundary and internal layering in extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx. ProcessDisclosure must render reasoning/tools via collapsed-by-default <details>; FinalAnswerPanel must own incremental final-text rendering without assistant-article remount.
designDecisions: SystemArchitect completed brownfield analysis and proposed software-unit decomposition refining planning seed TASK-017 into review-only proposed tasks TASK-017-01 through TASK-017-05. Human approval is required before dispatching Implementation.
Human reviewer replied 同意. Implementation dispatch is now authorized for architect-defined tasks TASK-017-01 through TASK-017-05 under the approved full-model requirement ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX.

ModelUpdated: Rework batch for TASK-018,TASK-019,TASK-020,TASK-021,TASK-022 is a narrow verification-contract refinement only. No UX redesign or sidepanel scope expansion is authorized. Existing ownership boundary remains extension/src/sidepanel. Refined implementation contract requires explicit scanner-verifiable requirement tagging for ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX in executed automated regression tests: extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts for transcript projection coverage, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.test.tsx for historical/live rendering and presentation coverage, and extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.chromeSandbox.test.tsx for mixed-order streaming boundary coverage. Preferred exact marker is // @RequirementID: ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX placed at test-file or primary describe-block level; existing architecture tags should be retained. Validation evidence after rework must show executed tagged tests plus run_reality_scanner verifiedIntentIds containing ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX, enabling QA and Audit to pass without unrelated code changes.

ModelUpdated: Human-approved architecture rework for sidepanel transcript rendering defect. No new software units introduced. Reuse TASK-018 as retry target for SU-SP-TRANSCRIPT-PROJECTION and TASK-022 as retry target for SU-SP-CONVERSATION-VIEWPORT because the issue is a contract refinement within existing ownership boundaries, not a decomposition change. Reject useSidepanelController.ts, useScrollFollowController.ts, backend/*, python_adapter/*, and dist/* as primary ownership modules. Mandatory acceptance: one prompt + reasoning + tool call + tool result + streaming text flow for a single runId must end with exactly 2 transcript articles total (1 user, 1 assistant); ProcessDisclosure must use native <details> collapsed by default; assistant article parent container must not unmount/remount during high-frequency text deltas; run_chrome_sandbox must verify the DOM anti-fragmentation and stability assertions.

qa.summary: QA passed for ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX at commit c3c6259351e895bf96a4071bd247c75b2d18d153. Validated TASK-018 and TASK-022 with targeted executed tests in extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.test.tsx, and extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.chromeSandbox.test.tsx (54 tests passed) plus extension workspace typecheck passed. Executable evidence covers one-run one-user/one-assistant article boundary, empty user answer suppression, collapsed-by-default native details disclosure, FinalAnswerPanel incremental ownership, anti-fragmentation DOM count, and assistant article stability across tail updates/finalization. run_chrome_sandbox was attempted but blocked by ERR_UNKNOWN_FILE_EXTENSION on the .tsx entry script, so sandbox-tool execution was not available; sandbox-capable coverage still executed locally via the chrome sandbox test file under Vitest/jsdom. 跳过了真实环境验证 because live_environment_ready=false.

audit.summary: Full-model architecture compliance audit passed for sidepanel transcript rework at commit c3c6259351e895bf96a4071bd247c75b2d18d153. Intent baseline ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX remains aligned with code reality for TASK-018 and TASK-022. TASK-018 acceptable no-change verification confirmed: extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts was unchanged in the audited commit and still retains SU-SP-TRANSCRIPT-PROJECTION ownership plus single-run assistant aggregation via buildStableTranscriptProjection. TASK-022 implementation in extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx preserves a single assistant article boundary, moves ProcessDisclosure to native collapsed-by-default <details>, keeps FinalAnswerPanel as owner of incremental final text rendering, and avoids assistant article remount churn across streaming updates. Tagged automated verification for ELM-REQ-OPENCODE-UX is present and scanner-verified in reasoningTimeline.test.ts, reasoningTimelineView.test.tsx, and reasoningTimeline.chromeSandbox.test.tsx. Targeted extension tests passed (54 tests) and extension typecheck passed.
